title: Making a Phone Call 打电话
scene: Lily打电话给朋友Tom，约他一起做作业。

lines.en: Hello, this is Lily. Is Tom there?
lines.zh: 你好，我是莉莉。汤姆在吗？

lines.en: Hi, Lily! This is Tom speaking.
What are you doing right now?
I'm doing my homework. It's a bit hard.
It's math. I don't understand this problem.
Don't worry. I can help you. I'm good at math.
lines.zh: 别担心。我可以帮你。我数学很好。

lines.en: That's great! Can you come to my house?
Sure! I can come at three o'clock.
Perfect! See you at three. Bye!
